content:
Hi everyone,

I am currently a high schooler working on summer projects before I go to school and get busy.

I'm working on GetBlocked!, a local-only Chrome extension that helps block common web trackers and clean tracking links.

I'm looking for contributors who want to help improve it.

Useful PRs could include:

• adding more tracker domains

• testing websites and reporting broken pages

• improving the popup UI

• improving docs

• adding tests

• reviewing the tracker categories

• suggesting safer MV3 patterns

I tried to make contributions easy. A small useful PR can be as simple as adding one tracker domain and one test fixture.

The project is intentionally small, local-only, and beginner-friendly. It does not use analytics, telemetry, accounts, or a backend.

Repo:

https://github.com/alex-w-developer/GetBlocked/

Small PRs are very much welcome.

If you find this project to be interesting and would like to show support, starring the repo would definitely help a lot.
